mapper.insert: insert into sys_purchase_check (purchase_id, purchase_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, check_result, check_remark, check_by, check_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{purchaseId}, #{purchaseNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{checkResult}, #{checkRemark}, #{checkBy}, #{checkTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into sys_purchase_check_item (check_id, food_id, food_name, plan_qty, real_qty, expire_check, pesticide_check, appearance_check, item_result) values
(#{checkId}, #{item.foodId}, #{item.foodName}, #{item.planQty}, #{item.realQty}, #{item.expireCheck}, #{item.pesticideCheck}, #{item.appearanceCheck}, #{item.itemResult})
